Premium Care for English Speakers
à Tanger

World-class dental services in the heart of Tangier. Dr. Reda Saoui and his team provide comprehensive dental care tailored for international patients, expats, and travelers.

Appeler 0666-061666WhatsApp

Your English Speaking Dentistin Tangier

Navigating healthcare in a foreign country can be challenging. At APEX Dental Clinic, we remove the language barrier, providing clear communication and exceptional care in English.

Dr. Reda Saoui and his highly trained staff are dedicated to ensuring that your dental experience is comfortable, transparent, and of the highest international standards.

Besoin d'aide ? 0666-061666

Souffrez-vous d'anxiété dentaire ?
Découvrez notre solution Solea Laser

Au sein de notre cabinet dentaire à Tanger, nous traitons l'anxiété dentaire grâce au Solea Laser innovant, une solution sans douleur qui élimine le besoin de fraises, d'aiguilles, de scalpels ou de bruits forts pendant les traitements. Avec cette technologie, vous pouvez bénéficier de soins dentaires sans stress ni inconfort !

The APEX Patient Journey

Designed for your comfort and peace of mind. Here is what you can expect when visiting us as an international patient.

1

Initial Contact

Reach out via WhatsApp or phone. Our English-speaking coordinator will assist you with scheduling and any initial questions.

2

Virtual Consultation

For major procedures, we can arrange a video call to discuss your needs and provide a preliminary treatment plan before you arrive.

3

Personalized Welcome

Upon arrival at our Tangier clinic, you'll be welcomed into our modern, tranquil environment by our friendly staff.

4

Advanced Care

Experience pain-free, high-tech dental treatments using the world's most advanced equipment, all explained clearly in English.

Why Choose Our International Clinic?

We specialize in treating international patients and expatriates living in Tangier. Our clinic combines advanced Moroccan dental expertise with a global standard of patient care.

Fluent English Communication
Expat-Friendly Services
International Standards
Advanced Digital Technology

A Premium Clinic Environment

We've designed APEX to be a sanctuary of health and comfort, combining luxury aesthetics with the world's most advanced dental equipment.

Painless Laser Care

The Solea Laser removes the need for drills and needles in many procedures.

Digital Workflow

3D scanning and printing for precise results in record time.

Robot-Assisted Mastery

Yomi-assisted implant surgery for unmatched surgical precision.

Luxury Serenity

A calm, stress-free environment designed for your ultimate comfort.

Serving the International Community

We are the preferred choice for the English-speaking community in Tangier, from digital nomads to long-term residents.

Malabata
City Center
Marshan
California District
Iberia
Gzenaya

The leading destination for English-speaking dental care in Northern Morocco.

Comprehensive Dental Solutions

General Dentistry

Routine check-ups, cleanings, and preventative care provided with clear English explanations.

Cosmetic Dentistry

Transform your smile with veneers, whitening, or Invisalign by an English-speaking expert.

Dental Implants

Advanced implantology using the latest Yomi robot-assisted technology for precision.

Oral Surgery

Expert surgical procedures in a comfortable, high-tech environment.

Emergency Care

Immediate assistance for dental emergencies with 24/7 priority for urgent cases.

Pediatric Care

Gentle dental care for the whole family, ensuring a positive experience for your children.

Traveler's Dental Care Tips

Stay Hydrated

The Moroccan climate can be dry. Drink plenty of water to maintain oral health.

Emergency Prep

Keep our contact details handy while traveling in Tangier for peace of mind.

Local Cuisine

Enjoy the food, but remember to maintain your routine brushing and flossing.

Regular Check-ups

Schedule a visit before long travels to avoid unexpected dental issues.

Call Us TodayWhatsApp Us
